About.description1: I’m a Frontend Developer who enjoys turning ideas into modern, interactive web experiences. I specialize in creating intuitive user interfaces and seamless user experiences that combine
About.description3: My expertise spans across React, TypeScript, Next.js, GSAP, Motion-animation and modern CSS frameworks. I’m constantly learning and staying up-to-date with the latest web development trends, always pushing the boundaries of what’s possible on the web.

Projects.subtitle: A selection of projects showcasing my skills, creativity, and approach to building modern web applications

gadgets.title: Electronics Store
gadgets.description: A modern e-commerce application for browsing phones, tablets, and accessories. Features include a shopping cart, favorites, theme switching, and multi-language support.

air.title: Creative Landing Page
air.description: A modern, visually rich landing page with smooth animations, interactive background effects, and responsive design.

game2048.title: 2048 Game
game2048.description: A browser-based implementation of the classic 2048 puzzle game with smooth controls, score tracking, and clean UI.

nothing.title: Nothing Landing Page
nothing.description: A minimalist, high-performance landing page built with HTML, SCSS, and JavaScript, featuring responsive design and clean UI.

travel.title: Travel Landing Page
travel.description: A clean and responsive landing page built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, featuring modern layout techniques and semantic structure.
